creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://people.freebsd.org/~eadler/files/blame-is-on-me.diff

This patch mechanically converts uses of "gnomehack" to "pathfix".  This was almost entirely scripted with the exception of the following ports

./x11-toolkits/fox16/Makefile
./x11-toolkits/libgdiplus/Makefile
./x11-toolkits/py-gnome-desktop/Makefile
./x11-toolkits/py-gnome2/Makefile
./x11-toolkits/py-vte/Makefile
./x11/xscreensaver-gnome/Makefile
./x11/yelp/Makefile

which already had USES and so were done by hand.

This is a request for an exp-run as well as well as requesting permission to commit.

It does not concern me whether this happens prior, during, or after, the freeze.

I believe once this diff is committed there should be no additional need for gnomehack.
